## Memory Snapshot

### MEMORY.md
# JARVIS Project Memory

## Identity
- Bot name: JARVIS (Telegram Bot AI Assistant)
- Runtime: Bun + TypeScript + Grammy
- AI: Claude CLI / Gemini CLI / ChatGPT Shortcuts (従量課金API絶対禁止)
- DB: Cloudflare D1 (Memory Gateway)
- Git: github.com/DAIJIROMATSUOKA/claude-telegram-bot
- M1 MAX = mothership, M3 = DJ workstation

## Architecture (2026-02-15 confirmed)
- DJ → 🦞(設計+実装+テスト+修正、全部直接) + Auto-Kick
- Jarvisは通知+cron+夜間バッチのみ。実装委譲は不要
- Task Poller独立LaunchAgent (com.jarvis.task-poller)
- Auto-Kick Watchdog (com.jarvis.autokick-watchdog)
- exec bridge: claude.ai → Memory Gateway → M1 Poller → 実行

## Critical Rules
- 従量課金API使用禁止 (4層防御: code/env/npm/git-hook)
- Bot再起動は必ず scripts/restart-bot.sh
- exec bridge >30s → --fire --notify async
- /tmp/croppy-stop で緊急停止
- DESIGN-RULES.md必読 before debate/design/new feature

## Current State
- Auto-Kick deployed ✅ (watchdog + croppy-start/done + notify-dj)
- Task Poller independent ✅
- Media Queue serialization ✅
- /edit SIGTERM bug: partially mitigated (queue), root cause TBD
- 6 git commits pending push

## Key Files
- CLAUDE.md — master instructions
- src/handlers/ — text, streaming, council, ai-session, media-commands
- src/bin/task-poller.ts — independent poller
- scripts/auto-kick-watchdog.sh, croppy-start.sh, croppy-done.sh
- autonomous/state/M1.md — state file (single source of truth)
- scripts/ai-media.py — Python image processing (~1519 lines)

## Topic Files
- See architecture.md for design decisions
- See lessons.md for learned patterns
- See task-state.md for open tasks

### Architecture Decisions
# Architecture Decisions

## [DECIDED] 2026-02-15: Auto-Kick replaces Jarvis delegation
- Before: DJ→🦞(設計)→Jarvis(実装)→🦞(監視)
- After: DJ→🦞(全部直接)+Auto-Kick. Jarvis=通知+cron only
- Reason: Jarvis implementation hangs. Direct exec is faster+reliable.

## [DECIDED] 2026-02-11: Poller独立化
- Task Poller = independent LaunchAgent (com.jarvis.task-poller)
- Jarvisクラッシュ → Poller生存 → exec bridge経由で自律修復
- exit規律: crash→exit(1)→再起動 / safe-mode→exit(0)→停止

## [DECIDED] 2026-02-11: Media Queue serialization
- withMediaQueue() wraps all runAiMedia calls
- 同時FLUX+ComfyUI → memory pressure → SIGTERM prevention
- patch-queue.py is NOT idempotent (run once only)

## [DECIDED] 2026-02-15: HANDOFF自動化 Phase 1-2
- Claude Code Auto Memory + Hooks for session persistence
- Phase 1: CLI install ✅ (v2.1.25)
- Phase 2: Auto Memory setup (this file)
- Phase 3-5: Stop hooks, Tasks, full migration (future)
- Spec: docs/handoff-auto-spec.md

## [DECIDED] 2026-02-15: X info via web_search
- web_search "site:x.com keyword" — zero browser ops, zero cost
- Rejected: Chrome scraping, Barresider, X API ($200/mo), Grok browser

## [DECIDED] 2026-02: 従量課金API 4層防御
- Layer 1: Code — all AI calls via CLI
- Layer 2: .env — API_KEY vars deleted
- Layer 3: npm — @google/generative-ai SDK removed
- Layer 4: git hook — Husky pre-commit BANNED keyword check

## [DECIDED] 2026-02-15: Stop hook auto-HANDOFF (Phase 3)
- .claude/settings.local.json defines Stop hook (async, 30s timeout)
- scripts/auto-handoff.py: git state + memory + M1 state -> HANDOFF
- Output: ~/Machinelab Dropbox/.../JARVIS-Journal/auto-handoff-YYYY-MM-DD.md
- Append mode: multiple sessions per day
- Telegram notification on each session end
- Always exit(0) - Stop hooks must not block

## [DECIDED] 2026-02-15: Nightly autonomous execution (Phase 4)
- jarvis-nightly.sh: launchd com.jarvis.nightly at 23:00 JST
- Reads task-state.md, picks unchecked tasks, executes via claude -p
- Key fix: < /dev/null required for headless mode (TTY hang prevention)
- --dangerously-skip-permissions for unattended execution
- 3 tasks max, 15min timeout each, 30s cooldown
- Auto-handoff + memory-sync on completion
- nightly-claude.sh (cron) is duplicate - REMOVE from crontab

## [DECIDED] 2026-02-17: Croppy自律ループ (Plan D)
- M1.mdに計画 → exec bridge --fire → Claude Code spawn → polling → 検証 → 次ステップ
- 死亡復帰: Auto-Kick → M1.md読んで自動再開
- Phase 1,2テスト成功。仕様書: docs/croppy-loop-spec.md

## [DECIDED] 2026-02-17: /code コマンド (Telegram直通)
- /code <task> → nohup claude -p spawn → Stop hookでTelegram通知
- 2レーン: heavy→/code, light→Jarvis, design→クロッピー

## [DECIDED] 2026-02-17: Morning Briefing (Phase 1)
- 毎朝2:30 launchd → Claude Code web_fetch+search → Telegram配信
- X API却下(従量課金), スクレイピング却下(BAN), Grok却下(脆弱)
- LaunchAgent: com.jarvis.morning-briefing

## [DECIDED] 2026-02-17: /edit SIGTERM Fix 1-5
- SIGTERM handler, progress newline, keep-alive 30s, ws timeout 30s, try/finally cleanup
- 実戦テスト通過(steps 15)

## [DECIDED] 2026-02-17: Agent Teams見送り
- research previewで制限多い（/resume不可、タスクステータス遅延、delegate mode必須）
- headless -p パターンと相性悪い
- weekly limit 7倍消費リスク
- DJのタスクはsubagentで十分カバー可能
- 再評価条件: experimental外れた時、/resume復元対応時、大規模リファクタ発生時
- 代替: /codeプロンプトにsubagent委譲指示を追加で並列化

## [DEPLOYED] 2026-02-17: Claude Code Plugins (4 active)
1. **ralph-loop** — Ralph Loop実行（既存）
2. **hookify** — 会話分析→hook自動生成。従量課金block hook、stop時チェックリスト等に活用
3. **claude-md-management** — CLAUDE.md品質監査+改善。/revise-claude-mdで定期メンテ
4. **claude-code-setup** — コードベース分析→hook/skill/MCP/subagent最適構成診断（一度実行）
- 全てclaude-plugins-official、user scope
- headless -p 互換確認済み

## [DEPLOYED] 2026-02-17: Hookify Rules + SessionEnd Notification
### Hookify Rules (5th layer 従量課金防止)
- .claude/hookify.block-billing-sdk.local.md: SDK import + API key usage → BLOCK
- .claude/hookify.block-apikey-env.local.md: .env API key write → BLOCK
- .claude/hookify.warn-dangerous-rm.local.md: rm -rf → WARN
- .local.md files are gitignored, local only
### SessionEnd Notification
- scripts/session-end-notify.sh: 60秒遅延 → Telegram push
- ~/.claude/settings.json に SessionEnd hook 追加（全プロジェクト共通）
- nohup + disown でClaude Codeプロセス終了後も生存
- reason フィールドで終了理由を通知

- Scout Phase 2（/scout N）
- Scout Phase 3（SAFE:自動実行）


### Lessons Learned
# Lessons Learned (Updated 2026-03-03)
*Auto-synced from DESIGN-RULES.md §8*

### インフラ
- `core.hooksPath=.husky/_` が設定されていると `.git/hooks/` は完全に無視される
- Jarvisのログ報告は信用できない → M1ターミナルでDJ直接grep
- Bunのspawn timeout は Node.js と挙動が異なる
- `claude -p` は非対話環境でパーミッション確認ハング → `--dangerously-skip-permissions` 必須
- Poller子プロセスでclaude -p → メモリ圧迫SIGTERM → nohupで独立プロセス化が正解
- launchctl load/unload state がPoller死の根本原因だった
- crontab は exec bridge 経由で使えない（TCC権限） → LaunchAgent一択

### GAS (Google Apps Script)
- GAS(Google Apps Script): トークン等はPropertiesService、コード更新はclasp push。手動貼り替え前提の設計は禁止

### AI関連
- ChatGPT Shortcuts: 毎回新チャット、`continuous=true`はCLI自動化で使えない
- ChatGPT Pro: レート制限に達すると3週間Proモデル使用不可
- Gemini CLI: 引数方式で失敗 → stdin方式に変更
- detectWorkMode()のconfidenceは不安定 → キーワードマッチが確実

### Gateway
- Gateway cleanup: ISO日付とSQLite datetime()は比較不可 → replace('T',' ')で正規化
- `~/.claude/settings.json` の deny: `Bash(rm -rf /:**)` は無効 → `Bash(rm -rf /*)` に修正
- memory-gateway は ~/memory-gateway/ にある（claude-telegram-bot内ではない）

### メディア
- outpaint の edge-mirror fill → 平均色+ノイズfill に変更
- withMediaQueue() で重いAI処理を直列化（同時実行=メモリ圧迫SIGTERM）
- patch-queue.py は冪等ではない（2回実行で重複宣言エラー）

### mdb-tools (Access DB)
- bash直接だと日本語テーブル名で失敗 → Python subprocess経由なら動く
- `mdb-export` + csv.DictReader で構造化データ取得
